name: keycloak
explanation: The Keycloak integration is logs-only: spec.yaml defines a single `logs` block (TCP/UDP syslog listener) and no `instances` block, and the package ships no Agent check class — there is no live endpoint for an auto-config probe to hit. The user must configure Keycloak to forward syslog to a port the Agent listens on, which is user policy, not a discoverable property. This matches the pattern N (instrumentation/log-only) shape.
notes: Keycloak does expose a Prometheus `/metrics` endpoint upstream, but this Datadog integration does not scrape it — it only ingests forwarded syslog. Auto-config in the network-probe sense doesn't apply.
